summary: Phase 1-4 ABNDT full backend + frontend test. Backend 17/18 passing (1 skipped, no failures). Frontend: AI chat, Cookie banner, Footer payment badges, Blog detail nav, Filter badge, PDP Image Lightbox + chevrons + ESC, Sticky ATC mobile all working. Admin AI description button could not be reached because /admin requires login and post-login redirects to /shop while /admin then bounces back to /login (possible admin route guard issue or session not propagating to admin pages).

integration_issues.issue: After successful login with admin@abndt.com/Admin@12345, navigating to /admin redirects back to /login?next=%2Fadmin. Could not reach AdminDashboard product form to test admin-ai-generate-description button.

issues: Per task spec the accept button should be data-testid 'cookie-accept-all'; current implementation uses 'cookie-accept'. Minor naming mismatch — visible label is 'Accept all' (correct UX).

action_items: Investigate /admin route guard: after admin@abndt.com login, navigating to /admin bounces to /login. Likely an issue with how AdminDashboard reads the auth state (httpOnly cookie may need a /me re-fetch or the role check is racing). Once fixed, re-run admin AI description test.
Optional: align cookie banner testid to 'cookie-accept-all' if external tests rely on it (label already says 'Accept all').
critical_code_review_comments: ai_routes.py uses fail-soft fallback in chat — good. generate-description also has template fallback — good.
/api/promo/validate is unauthenticated and uses in-memory PROMO_CODES dict — acceptable for MVP but should be DB-backed for production.
commerce_routes.py is 1873 lines — should be split into smaller modules (orders, promo, admin, cart) per file-size rule.
Mongo _id correctly excluded via projections in ai_routes._search_products and review_summary.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (admin AI description blocked by routing/auth issue)

test_credentials: admin@abndt.com / Admin@12345 (login API works; frontend /admin route is gated)
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded catalog (91 products).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AI backend endpoints (/api/ai/chat, /api/ai/generate-description, /api/ai/review-summary/{id}) are verified working via real Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 through Emergent universal key. /api/promo/validate works for WELCOME10/FREESHIP/SAVE20 plus invalid/min_order cases. Frontend AI assistant chat round-trip verified including inline product card render and Reset/Close. Lightbox + chevrons + ESC verified on PDP. Sticky ATC verified on mobile viewport. Cookie banner present with X dismiss + 'Accept all' button (testid 'cookie-accept'). Footer payment badges verified. Blog detail navigation works (/blog/abndt-core). Filter badge increments via ?category=electronics URL param. Only outstanding flow: admin product form AI generate description button (could not access /admin after admin login on frontend).
rca of the issue: Admin guard: When logging in via /login, the user is redirected to /shop (not the original /admin next param). On subsequent navigation to /admin, the AdminRoute (or equivalent) re-evaluates auth state and likely the user object/role check fails (perhaps role is fetched async after route guard executes). Recommend: ensure admin auth state hydrates before redirect, or use /api/me check inside the route guard, or honor ?next=%2Fadmin after login.
